hero.headline: Have an award-winning insurer by your side

motor.title: Motor Insurance
motor.description: Hassle-free coverage for your cars and two-wheelers with instant digital policy generation.
motor.for_whom_desc: Individuals who own personal vehicles, fleet operators seeking commercial coverage.

health.title: Health Insurance
health.description: Comprehensive medical protection for you and your family to cover unexpected hospitalization expenses.
health.for_whom_desc: Nuclear and extended families, senior citizens, corporate employees looking for top-up plans.
benefits: Pre-existing disease coverage after waiting period

term.title: Term Life Insurance
term.description: Secure your family's financial future with high-cover pure protection plans at affordable premium rates.
term.for_whom_desc: Primary breadwinners, young professionals with dependents, parents with active home loans.

home.title: Home Insurance
home.description: Protect your home and valuables against fire, theft, and natural disasters.

travel.title: Travel Insurance
travel.description: Secure your journeys with coverage for medical emergencies, trip cancellations, and lost baggage.
travel.for_whom_desc: Frequent travelers, students studying abroad, corporate employees on business trips.

fire.title: Fire Insurance
fire.description: Protect your property against fire accidents and related damages.
benefits: Coverage for fire and allied perils

marine.title: Marine Insurance
marine.description: Safeguard cargo and ships against sea-related risks.
benefits: Protection against piracy and natural calamities

commercial.title: Commercial Insurance
commercial.description: Comprehensive protection for businesses against property damage, liability, and employee safety risks.

addon.title: Add-on Insurance
addon.description: Enhance your base policy with add-ons for extra protection.

cyber.title: Cyber Security Insurance
cyber.description: Protect your digital assets against cyber threats, data breaches, and online fraud.
cyber.for_whom_desc: Businesses, startups, individuals with online presence.

modal.title: Request a Call Back
modal.subtitle: Fill in the details below and our claims team will get back to you shortly.
modal.unavailable_form: or fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly
modal.name: Full Name
modal.success: Request submitted successfully! We will call you back soon.
